query:
INSERT INTO
                        gbfs_station_status
                            ( station_id
                            , num_bikes_available
                            , num_docks_available
                            , is_installed
                            , is_renting
                            , is_returning
                            , last_reported
                            , vehicle_types_available
                            )
                        VALUES
                            ( ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ? )
